description: TCPI V1/V2 attack success rate across model families (GPT-4o, GPT-4o-mini, Claude)
status: BLOCKED — OpenAI API key has insufficient_quota. Top up billing or provide new key.

protocol.note: Matching the 50-rollout protocol from the Claude-only experiments

blocked_reason.message: OpenAI API key returned 429 insufficient_quota. The key's billing plan needs to be topped up.
resolution_options: Provide a different OPENAI_API_KEY with available quota
Use OpenRouter (export OPENROUTER_API_KEY) which routes to GPT-4o via a separate billing account

expected_finding: Based on InjecAgent (Zhan 2024) and AgentDojo (Debenedetti 2024), GPT-4o is expected to show HIGHER TCPI ASR than Claude for V1 (structural field collision), because OpenAI's function-calling mechanism more aggressively propagates structured data from tool outputs into downstream tool parameters. GPT-4o-mini is expected to be even more susceptible due to weaker safety training.
